prompt: Create a vertical anime fashion poster featuring NOZOMU, a stylish modern dreamer girl in a dynamic waist-up-to-thigh pose. She stands slightly angled, arms raised behind her head, with long layered black-and-white hair with vivid electric-blue streaks, loose strands, and glossy highlights. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered soft-edged square blur/censor block in muted gray-beige tones, hiding facial features. She wears a cropped black sailor-style top with rolled short sleeves, white trim, a blue necktie, a small chest patch marked “OT,” black harness straps crossing the torso, a pleated black mini skirt with gray and blue panels, a chunky black belt with a silver buckle, dangling chains, a star charm, zipper details, and blue accent ribbons. Add jewelry details including blue earrings, bracelets, and small metallic accessories. Use a refined high-detail anime illustration style with sharp ink lines, elegant shading, pale skin highlights, and a limited palette of black, off-white, gray, and vivid cobalt blue. The background is a clean editorial collage: cream paper texture, concrete-gray geometric blocks, torn-paper fragments, diagonal linework, black rectangular panels, blue paint strokes, and subtle grunge textures. Include exactly six visible typography blocks: 1) upper left small stacked serif text “OWN THE LIGHT”; 2) lower left black block with spaced text “MODERN DREAMER”; 3) large elegant serif title near lower left reading “NOZOMU”; 4) small blue caption under the title reading “VISIBLE GRACE. QUIET IMPACT.”; 5) right middle small label “ARCHIVE 07”; 6) right lower stacked text “MOVE LIGHT. DREAM FAR.” Keep the layout asymmetrical and magazine-cover-like, with generous negative space on the left and the character dominating the center-right. Use crisp poster composition, premium fashion editorial energy, blue brush accents, high resolution, no extra characters, no watermark.
